3022680.name: Book of Spells 2
3022680.description:
Book of Spells 2 is a continuation of the first part of the adventure game. This time an even more dangerous adventure awaits you, in which new enemies and locations await you! Monsters have crept into your world from the depths and only you can stop them! Grab your staff and go on an adventure!

You have to explore colorful locations, fight dangerous opponents and bosses, and most importantly - return the book of spells and close all the portals from which monsters sneak into your world!

Peculiarities
- Nice soundtrack
- Colorful graphics.
- Dangerous opponents
3022680.supported_languages:
英语*, 俄语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
